headline: This Schwab ETF Holds 100 Dividend Stocks, Charges $6 a Year, and Yields More Than Most Savings Accounts
summary: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHD) costs $6 a year on a $10,000 investment, holds 100 dividend stocks, and currently yields 3.39%. With the Fed funds rate sitting at 3.75% and most high-yield savings accounts paying in that same neighborhood, the yield gap is narrow. But SCHD adds something a savings account never will: price ... This Schwab ETF Holds 100 Dividend Stocks, Charges $6 a Year, and Yields More Than Most Savings Accounts

headline: Lockheed Martin Faces Donation Scrutiny And F-35 Software Setback Risks
summary: Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT) has committed a US$10 million contribution to the new White House ballroom project, drawing attention to government contractor influence and potential conflicts of interest. The donation comes while federal authorities are investigating other donors to the project, increasing scrutiny around political ties for a major defense supplier. Separately, the Pentagon's testing office has reported ongoing delays and capability issues with the latest F-35 software upgrades,...
